sentences.text: Besides, he used to say, he will give me his wheelbarrow, and that is very generous.
So little Hans worked for the Miller, and the Miller talked a lot about friendship, which Hans wrote in a notebook and read every night because he was a good student.
One evening, little Hans was sitting by his fire when he heard a loud knock at the door.
It was a wild night, and the wind was blowing and roaring around the house so much that at first he thought it was just the storm.
